title: Fantasy Realms
description:
This mod hopes to expand Minecraft's progression beyond the Ender Dragon, and further improve on story and game mechanics. While still keeping Minecraft's 
core.
body:
![Minecraft Fantasy Realms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f70eb1b03fe5e980135d92a8b4443ad6266bcdd8.png)

# Over View
Fantasy Realms is a fast growing mod that will change a lot of vanilla features to bring in rpg style elements including a new combat system, mining system, and eventialy a very intuitive crafting system. The mod will also be introducing a story line for you to follow as you play, and it will be relavent to Minecraft own lore and story.

# Resources
__The current version (Beta 0.4.0) adds the items listed.__
- Lonoxieum 
- Grohinieum
- Oxidenom
- Tools
- Armor
- Ores and Seral Other Blocks
- Misk Items

# For The Future
The current plan is to slowly introduce these remaining meterals(Ogmenite, Crivonieumite, and Zithanieumite) throught the beta version right before the first full reales. As well adding the updated combat system around the Beta 0.5.0 Version.

Thanks for checking out the mod and remember, __****The Realms Await!****__

In the near future this project will be updated and be under a new management team, so if you have or will suport this mod be on the look out for the future of the realms.
